data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a 'Damage/cleaning bond' but did not provide sufficient evidence to confirm its enforcement or existence. The use case summary mentions a '$500 damage deposit held', which implies a bond, but there is no concrete evidence or API read that explicitly verifies this requirement as satisfied. This indicates a gap in the validation process, as the requirement is not fully covered by the existing evidence.
gaps: No evidence confirming the enforcement or existence of a 'Damage/cleaning bond'.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
